analyst_notes: With-skill: 100% pass rate across all 3 evals (28/28 assertions). Without-skill: 27% (8/28).
With-skill converges in 1 round every time. Without-skill needs 2 rounds on eval-30 (CSO failed round 1 at 3.3/5).
With-skill is 40% faster on average (225s vs 375s) and uses 10% fewer tokens (47K vs 52K).

The skill's primary value is threefold: (1) canonical buyer-persona schema, (2) formal multi-perspective assessment with per-criterion scoring, (3) consistent convergence with independent persona reviewers.
Language fix validated: Market Expert reviewer specifically praised natural German content ('reads like it was written by someone who works in the sector, not translated from English').

Revision loop still not exercised in with_skill runs — all 3 evals accepted round 1. The independent persona reviewers (CSO 4.67, Market Expert 4.50) are not critical enough to trigger revisions. Consider tightening convergence thresholds (4.0→4.5) if revision loop coverage is desired.

Baseline eval-30 has a qualitative strength: 5 named customers with per-account deal sizing, competitive landscape, and next-best-actions. The with_skill run correctly defers named customers to a separate workflow step.
Non-discriminating assertions: CC-07 (score improvement between rounds) is vacuously true on round-1 convergence. C-07 and C-09 pass for both configurations.
